docket_entries.description: MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-05-2013 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT KAREN FAZZINA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT.
